overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a female character walking along a sunny coastal beach. The character traverses grassy dunes, transitions onto sandy beach, and explores a beachside skate park with concrete ramps. Bright clear skies and warm summer lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal grass dunes adjacent to sandy beach

events.description: character stops walking and stands still briefly looking around

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along grassy dunes parallel to the beach, briefly pausing to observe surroundings

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the coastal path
green grassy dunes with small white flowers
sandy beach area sloping down to the water
calm blue ocean water along the horizon
tall buildings visible in the distance along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along grassy coastal dunes with palm trees to the left and a sandy beach to the right. The ocean stretches out to the horizon under a clear blue sky. At around 18 seconds, the character briefly stops to look around before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach approaching skate park structures

events.description: character turns from grassy path onto sandy beach surface

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach approaching colorful concrete skate ramps in the distance

entered.detail: large concrete skateboarding ramps and structures on the beach
colorful canopies and tent structures scattered on the sand

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from grass to sand, walking along the beach toward a skate park area. The grassy dunes and palm trees fall behind as colorful tents and concrete ramps come into view ahead. The ocean remains visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach skate park with concrete ramps and obstacles

events.description: enters the concrete skate park area with multiple ramps and obstacles

agents.ego_description: walking among and around the concrete skate ramps exploring the beach park layout

entered.detail: large concrete bowl structure for skateboarding
concrete ramps with orange painted surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character enters the beach skate park, walking among various concrete ramps, bowls, and obstacles. The sandy ground is surrounded by skate structures, with the ocean still visible in the background. The character explores the area, moving between the ramps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a natural coastal landscape into a structured beachside skate park. It begins with the character walking along grassy dunes lined with palm trees, with the vast ocean stretching toward the horizon under a clear blue sky. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from grass to sand, leaving the greenery behind as colorful tents and concrete ramps emerge in the distance. The scene then opens into the skate park, where the camera follows the character weaving through a series of concrete bowls and obstacles. Finally, the movement concludes with an exploration of the ramps while the ocean remains a constant backdrop to the right.
